title: Is the VIbe ui library open source, can it be legally used in non-monday projects?
excerpt:
Hello, 
Is the VIbe ui library open source, can it be legally used in non-monday projects? 
I love Vibe, I like it better than ShadCN

posts.author: orensayag (oren)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,
Is the VIbe ui library open source, can it be legally used in non-monday projects?

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @orensayag,

The Vibe team asked me to thank you for the compliment

You can check our @vibe/core license at vibe/packages/core/LICENSE at master · mondaycom/vibe · GitHub
